title: Canal Transportation, Centering Ability and Maintain Canal Curvature of Sendoline Versus Protaper Universal Rotary Nickel Titanium Files in Preparing Curved Root Canals: An In Vitro Study
abstract: The purpose of this study was to evaluate the shaping ability of S5 rotary system in relation to Pro Taper Universal system in preparation moderately curved root canal their effect on the canal transportation, centering ability and canal curvature change.
subject: Nickel titanium
Root canal
Curvature
Dentistry
Mathematics
